- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Full-stack digital avatar app with React frontend and FastAPI backend
  - Real-time voice I/O with Claude AI conversation
  - 3D rendering with lip sync and emotional expressions

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created frontend with React + Vite + React Three Fiber
  - Created backend with FastAPI + WebSockets
  - Set up directory structure with frontend/ and backend/ folders

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Implemented Avatar scene component with blend shapes support
  - Added voice input hook using Web Speech API
  - Implemented TTS hook with viseme events
  - Created FastAPI WebSocket endpoint for chat
  - Integrated Claude API with emotion tag parsing
  - Set up CORS and WebSocket handling

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No additional VS Code extensions needed for this project

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Frontend dependencies ready (React, Three.js, React Three Fiber)
  - Backend dependencies ready (FastAPI, Anthropic client)
  - Environment configuration prepared

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Ready to start frontend dev server (npm run dev)
  - Ready to start backend server (python main.py)

- [x] Launch the Project
  - See running instructions below

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with full setup and usage instructions
